en-US.title: FamilyPlate Meal Planner
en-US.subtitle: AI dinners from your pantry
en-US.promoText: Plan family dinners from what you already have. Scan groceries, build a pantry, save recipes, and turn missing ingredients into a grocery list.
en-US.description:
FamilyPlate helps busy households turn pantry staples into practical dinner plans.

Scan groceries, track pantry items, save favorite recipes, and build grocery lists from the ingredients you are missing. When you want dinner ideas, FamilyPlate can use your pantry, preferences, and recipe history to suggest meals that fit what is already in your kitchen.

Features:

- Pantry tracking for ingredients you already have
- Camera and barcode scanning for faster grocery entry
- AI dinner ideas based on pantry items and household preferences
- Weekly meal planning for family dinners
- Saved cookbook recipes with ingredients and instructions
- Grocery list tools for missing recipe ingredients
- Account deletion, privacy, support, and terms links in Settings

FamilyPlate is not medical advice. Always verify ingredient labels, allergy information, and nutrition details yourself, especially for medical diets, allergies, or food restrictions.

Terms of Use (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
FamilyPlate Terms: https://familyplate.co/terms
Privacy Policy: https://familyplate.co/privacy
en-US.releaseNotes: Initial App Store release with pantry tracking, grocery scanning, meal planning, cookbook, and grocery list tools.
